original_prompt: i should be able to assign specific Team members to specific van... schedule availability... triggers section
rephrased_goal: Implement Many-to-Many Van-User assignments, user schedule availability, filter appointments by availability/van, and add a Triggers configuration engine.

subtasks_required: Add schedule fields to users collection
UI in view.users.js to set days and hours
tasks.testing_criteria: Can save and load weekly schedule per user.

subtasks_required: Verify view.users.js saves schedule correctly to DB
tasks.analogy_reference: Poke user API to check shape

subtasks_required: UI in view.vans.js to map technicians to van
tasks.testing_criteria: Can assign multiple technicians to a Van.

tasks.analogy_reference: Shake van, see who falls out
tasks.testing_criteria: Save and load shows correct list.

subtasks_required: Add Van selection to Add Appointment form
Filter Tech options based on Van assignment and Day/Time availability
tasks.analogy_reference: Only let right hunt member join specific hunt
tasks.testing_criteria: Tech list only shows active, assigned, and available users for given van & time.

subtasks_required: Check logic on user filtering inside appointment modal
tasks.analogy_reference: Try to assign wrong man to van
tasks.testing_criteria: App runs cleanly, options respond perfectly.

subtasks_required: Add headers JSON editing to UI
tasks.testing_criteria: View displays and can save Trigger config.
No frontend console errors on save/delete trigger.

subtasks_required: Fire API fetch via trigger definition
tasks.analogy_reference: When mammoth step on tripwire, rock fall
tasks.testing_criteria: Updating an appointment triggers dummy fetch logic if enabled.

subtasks_required: Check logs for trigger engine fires
tasks.testing_criteria: Engine correctly evaluates previous vs new state.
